codeReview.summary: validation-docs is a documentation-only validation feature. The feature validates that all new observability commands (mapj health, mapj observability metrics) and flags (--log-level, --observe, --service) are properly documented across README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md, and all skill files. The feature did not implement code but validated existing documentation through grep-based verification.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The docs-worker skill returned 'not found' during transcript execution, causing followedProcedure to be marked false. The worker proceeded manually using mission.md and validation-contract.md, which contained sufficient detail to complete the validation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: 'The `docs-worker` skill returned an error (not found), but I have the full documentation plan from the mission.' Worker then manually validated all assertions via grep commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: All three sub-skills (mapj-tdn-search, mapj-confluence-export, mapj-protheus-query) have consistent 'Health and Observability' sections referencing both mapj health and mapj observability metrics commands.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: grep -r 'Health and Observability' skills/ returns results in all 3 sub-skills. Each section shows: 'mapj health --service=<service>' and 'mapj observability metrics' commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Documentation completeness validated: mapj health (README table + detailed section + skill routing + all 3 sub-skills), mapj observability metrics (README table + detailed section + skill routing + all 3 sub-skills), --log-level (README global flags table with values), --observe (README global flags table + env var MAPJ_OBSERVE=1), --service (documented in health section)
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All grep verification commands in transcript returned exit code 0. validation-state.json shows VAL-COMPLETE-001, VAL-COMPLETE-002, VAL-COMPLETE-003 all passed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Version consistency verified: README.md section header 'Observability Commands (CLI v0.3.0)' matches CHANGELOG.md v0.3.0 entry with date 2026-04-12. Skill metadata versions (2.1.0, 4.0.0) are separate from CLI version scheme (0.3.0) - no inconsistency.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: grep '0.3.0' README.md shows 'CLI v0.3.0' header. grep '0.3.0' CHANGELOG.md shows entry with date 2026-04-12.

summary: validation-docs feature PASSES scrutiny. All 3 assertions (VAL-COMPLETE-001, VAL-COMPLETE-002, VAL-COMPLETE-003) are satisfied. Documentation is complete and consistent across README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md, and all skill files. The worker had to proceed manually due to docs-worker skill unavailability, but completed the validation thoroughly using grep-based verification. No blocking issues found.
